2605.11053.title: MCPShield: Content-Aware Attack Detection for LLM Agent Tool-Call Traffic
2605.11053.paper_summary: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) has become a widely adopted interface for LLM agents to invoke external tools, yet learned monitoring of MCP tool-call traffic remains underexplored. In this article, MCPShield is presented as an attack detection framework for MCP tool-call traffic that encodes each agent session as a graph (tool calls as nodes, sequential and data-flow links as edges), enriches nodes with sentence-embedding features over arguments and responses, and classifies sessions as benign or attacked. Three GNN architectures (GAT, GCN, GraphSAGE), a no-graph MLP, and classical baselines (XGBoost, random forest, logistic regression, linear SVM) are evaluated, with the full architecture comparison conducted on RAS-Eval (task-stratified splits) and GraphSAGE retained as the GNN baseline on ATBench and a combined-source variant (both label-stratified). Three findings emerge. First, content-level features are essential: metadata-only detection plateaus around an AUROC of 0.64 regardless of architecture, while content embeddings push the AUROC above 0.89. Second, naive random-split evaluation inflates AUROC by up to 26 percentage points relative to task-disjoint splits, a memorization confound that prior agent-detection work has not addressed. Third, the detection signal resides primarily in the SBERT content embeddings: an AUROC of 0.975 was reached by tree ensembles on pooled embeddings, performing, for the most part, better than the neural architectures in the primary RAS-Eval setting including GNNs (0.917) and the MLP (0.896), and self-supervised pre-training does not deliver a label-efficiency advantage on this task.
2605.11053.paper_summary_zh: 模型上下文協議（MCP）已成為大型語言模型（LLM）代理調用外部工具的廣泛採用介面，但對MCP工具調用流量的學習監控仍然未被充分探討。本文提出了MCPShield作為一個針對MCP工具調用流量的攻擊檢測框架，將每個代理會話編碼為圖（工具調用作為節點，順序和數據流鏈接作為邊），用句子嵌入特徵豐富節點的參數和響應，並將會話分類為良性或受到攻擊。評估了三種GNN架構（GAT、GCN、GraphSAGE）、一個無圖的MLP，以及傳統基準（XGBoost、隨機森林、邏輯回歸、線性SVM），完整的架構比較在RAS-Eval（任務分層拆分）上進行，GraphSAGE作為ATBench上的GNN基準以及一個結合源變體（均為標籤分層）。三個發現浮現出來。首先，內容級特徵至關重要：僅使用元數據的檢測在AUROC約為0.64的水平上平穩，而內容嵌入則將AUROC推高至0.89以上。第二，天真的隨機拆分評估將AUROC膨脹多達26個百分點，相對於任務不重疊的拆分，這是一種記憶混淆，先前的代理檢測工作未能解決。第三，檢測信號主要存在於SBERT內容嵌入中：通過樹集成在池化嵌入上達到0.975的AUROC，表現大多優於主要RAS-Eval設置中的神經架構，包括GNN（0.917）和MLP（0.896），而自我監督的預訓練在這項任務上並未帶來標籤效率的優勢。
2605.11053.author: Sultan Zavrak et.al.
